query: ALTER TABLE lotes ADD COLUMN statusNfe ENUM('provisoria', 'confirmada') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'provisoria' AFTER status; ALTER TABLE lotes MODIFY COLUMN origem ENUM('acs', 'manual', 'transferencia') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual';
